name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20Against=20Antisemitism?=
subject: Hitler Was Not And Will Never Be Right About Anything.
body:
Demand that Rep. Mary Miller Immediately Resign. | | | [**View this email in your browser**](https://mailchi.mp/momsinoffice/11-million-georgians-have-voted-747564?e=3f151f8b74)
---
| [CHIP IN ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=6d5572e206&e=3f151f8b74)
---
[](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=dfd870ac9d&e=3f151f8b74)
# A blatant act of antisemitism...
My Friend,
Moms in Office is a progressive organization dedicated to achieving gender parity in our government and fighting for economic justice for all working women.
Our children deserve to grow up in a country where all are treated equal and have access to opportunity to pursue their potential.It is our mission to fight against any form of injustice and discrimination and it is time for all of us to remember the meaning and promise of America. Equality.We are joining the growing number of Democrats calling for the resignation of U.S. Rep. Mary Miller of Illinois, a newly sworn-in Republican who quoted Adolf Hitler at a rally outside the U.S. Capitol this week.We demand her immediate resignation and condemn her blatant act of antisemitism. The hateful rhetoric used by U.S. Rep Miller would be unacceptable for any American, but for an elected official it is disqualifyingPlease [**support** ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=edb9358ef0&e=3f151f8b74)our friends at **The Jewish Democratic Council of America** and join us in demanding U.S. Rep Mary Miller's immediate resignation.Every dollar makes a difference.Thank you,Simona Grace Founder of Moms in Office
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=62ea68871c&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | | | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8a3d01d813&e=3f151f8b74)| [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a13b4febf2&e=3f151f8b74)| [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=e7ced8ec10&e=3f151f8b74)
---|---|---
| | | _Copyright (C) 2021 Moms in Office. All rights reserved._ You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. Moms in Office13351 Riverside Dr # 265Sherman Oaks, CA 91423-2542
[Add us to your address book](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e) [Update Preferences](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74) | [Unsubscribe](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74&c=8a005b9826)

name: McAuliffe HQ
subject: re: Amanda Chase’s resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTLFA-LMVghHn9MdfmBq-chmG4QDWcfrneUHDPtEFqt9AnRHJ-5zeaWblFv7lbW6AR4jv3sNEh-qfa7GgK8SiCuHbTtyhus2hwAb4ko1zyu0YMsTNGSYJiSrIJvYuUqNG_dyYI4BJTFRJ_L0pqWSUVsjIODIJHxfqqVaUm7sGO7yXTWjyxbldBTEnKVwLPJLOxIhp9kZ9kfvokcHAj-bnGJGGM5lIqvHvXje4FrdQ4W0n6_eg_FxM6Xpsgj54uGze3sa7XSHjnsJJcPs2-UYU2J4lg7fTcuKx8irDIuRNNSS/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h0/cl_2stjzf8kjqzz7AramUDd7EadC4dh_3d4ttrN3jnY)
Derek,
I wanted to make sure you saw Terry's email. Amanda Chase’s radical views and her continued defense of the terrorists who attacked our nation’s Capitol make her unfit for office -- the one she currently holds in the Virginia Senate AND the governorship she's running for. **[Leaders across our commonwealth are calling for Chase’s immediate resignation. Let’s send a clear message with 5,000 signatures on our petition:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl4zYRfnl6sWnokwpn00aP7jQven1a0Xcg8Zu3Gtd3sjDcuHgp5iEith_H9fQmuN1dBtlH2f4gQqfvlB9zKFyJ9saQgId3I6HVoPIUqcThQvpMZI04C9yqQmy8dyrCsv8fqIqlKlYn6JIunA1OfyiVFiMIlBJRquEoQQ-7E_DWNbwqG1IduqMRCqo2fV09aTnafTeVeskdSWI5mcBNBBmEJaBJeveU5d6KlDA60U-lA7bbDDaaqSO1ze7EKmtCY1ZE/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h1/Zx09zs9VQxpfhsJmQi-0FZuYaJ10PC6rAa_ndcaShQQ) ** | [**ADD MY NAME »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl4zYRfnl6sWnokwpn00aP7jQven1a0Xcg8Zu3Gtd3sjDcuHgp5iEith_H9fQmuN1dBtlH2f4gQqfvlB9zKFyJ9LPTr3HiYQGYa5u_HXFMcHyUbhE7v4Y0rV7UEbvbtNXu505ZnZKT88_MxDltj_JvgBaNpE8PciBcZnDosG8i_xRqtGeFsVNLMI_Z3xfPVvZkq0EnIlMsvF3CqmKNRqNVOgrgFq7Yll6Nva7kC7rTvCMpQio5Wf3kTyVA_vJLtkq4/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h2/IuMbjqWmPX2i3kI-Bp7W_XGvqIfMuJJHOMp3R3bBmDU)
---
It’s time for us to say enough is enough and show Amanda Chase that the people of Virginia - and Americans across the country - will not stand for her radical, unpatriotic actions and allow her to keep her job.
**[Help us reach 5,000 signatures and show Amanda Chase just how many people reject her participation in this dark chapter of American history.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl4zYRfnl6sWnokwpn00aP7jQven1a0Xcg8Zu3Gtd3sjDcuHgp5iEith_H9fQmuN1dBtlH2f4gQqfvlB9zKFyJ9uaGe_nhl55AYu6hB1JMBP4FgwfTHGAw_2xR2Bh3l9N7836bpJ883mMrnkVevBLl7CpRhVKh_YTIF63mRdZiT7GpAZn68Ylkt1_nP8RVW9luPLLWnVptVcVvXg26Rt3nGlgxvx23BJKNgpcAhH_6mk7wGHoqrVaHnhfKNt0CGZdM/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h3/vt4TdjJmiUVwOADKhgFyLb7DX3oAZ3AE09NP-Wbp-ys)**
Grateful for your support,
McAuliffe HQ

_\---Forwarded message---_

Derek, let's look at the facts:
**FACT #1:** Amanda Chase took part in a rally that stoked a violent insurrection against the United States of America.
**FACT #2:** She defended the terrorists who laid siege to our nation’s Capitol and called them "patriots."
**[Under no circumstances should she continue to represent Virginians in the State Senate. Add your name and tell Amanda Chase she's got to go:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl4zYRfnl6sWnokwpn00aP7jQven1a0Xcg8Zu3Gtd3sjDcuHgp5iEith_H9fQmuN1dBtlH2f4gQqfvlB9zKFyJ9Y15Uhd1N_8Y0AZnA25WZlNKY-rGHq1jlsxozczjvmbnImoHiVOeuW5ddJvxPpjG6GZW22oGi3GQofcEkd3jC_IG4f0ypvNsLsY-a0Myq1I036TtaRpUub1DbdXtrBxOpOBJqhQfo1i9TZYqjAjpStpUEH009Fd1usYESwWr-ZAg/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h4/p5r7mKv9_XxCERz7s4LONy5RGK1h-kFnlgRpZZkkF44)**
[**ADD MY NAME »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl4zYRfnl6sWnokwpn00aP7W16PAJO7iltqR4hTDYnoWoqHBXp79T6VpT5btjx5Ajx2VIbxonLMOQ6JsFX3dUgsfm25_X5BC4lLwKyeXbbiiD0iDb2tfFabc-USmBZdcaYcn-yD1nwvF1zJ0jMd8DqDTD3yHSrQykXnlBZJQ1deP5UmaaiU7MKsB68SmJxpgMbWhvy-UPcgO41sbMI2wrE7Yh0IZaNwnu_0OMY-TjJVpSgIecCys5GJLPz5t3JuGK0/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h5/tWpVfPyMMl54_a_HeSxivj-FD4zBI6A6hL8cg_c6lZw)
---
Chase's record is clear. From spreading dangerous conspiracy theories to standing with armed militias, she does not represent who and what we are as Virginians.
We can't afford her in the Virginia Senate -- and we certainly can’t afford to elect her as the next Governor of Virginia.
\-- Terry

[**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTLFA-LMVghHn9MdfmBq-chmG4QDWcfrneUHDPtEFqt9BkTGGmHUflo1levXpqDRV9QNKSsgOC4vvhuNAz9KJc61leVYi3tKSdZmWSQSfES13YuKDCD0oaqzr-LbJ3HE2PPPRnqA_iugSZlQTWSGyc_8BpxmIQOHnotmPs92G3PndjJK_3CThc6rciJgXgaNOlm2fcGdFhfUN8zf3P59UhoUHNmZrkQ40kn42KdJCOdd0wh0sxlqD_R6EejJkuUJq1sQHMAUd1eAOCev_Fxlj530ncDXdd-qs0EIh3JS3i47/38g/aTEOda6WQW6fFhVLdnnbZQ/h6/ZrtzGi_fE5sqIMyOTY317iqEXexZIJ5iJ1TgeeCvPKk)
---

Paid for by Terry for Virginia
---

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Pressure Campaign Begins
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I'm generally a nice guy. Ask my friends. But when someone attacks my way of life or my liberty - they don't get to see my nice side anymore. **That's why politicians like Gene Pelowski, Paul Marquart, Dave Lislegard, Julie Sandstede, Mike Sundin and Rob Ecklund are about to see how hard we will work to make sure every voter in their district knows that they are siding with radical, Metro Democrats over their own constituents!** Despite voting to End Walz' Emergency Powers back in 2020 - when it was "easy" - they are now showing their true colors! When Rep Erik Mortensen stood up and challenged the Speaker of the House on Tuesday to get a vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution, those six Democrats voted against his motion and against YOU. In other words, their votes last year to End Walz' Emergency Powers were nothing more than a con. We finally have the numbers to win and they are cowering to the Democrat elites. What a shame. So we're following through with our promise to you and taking our message to the airwaves, newspaper pages, doors, and mailboxes to inform their voters that they're protecting Walz' Emergency Powers. We have radio ads on the airwaves in markets throughout Minnesota. For example, here's our radio ad running against Dave Lislegard: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/lislegard_radio_ad?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=2) **Politicians like Dave Lislegard think we're not paying attention. They think we aren't going to do anything about their vote last week. They couldn't be more WRONG!** Our volunteer teams spent 16 hours this weekend going door to door, business to business passing out lit in places like Moose Lake, Cloquet, Hibbing, Virginia, Eveleth and Ely. And we'll be in even more places on Monday. What makes Action 4 Liberty different than other groups out there is that we REFUSE TO QUIT. People are sick of conservatives not fighting tough. You won't have to worry about that with us. It would be a good idea for Reps Pelowski, Marquart, Lislegard, Sandstede, Sundin and Ecklund to pay attention here. If they don't want the pain of our pressure campaign, they need to start voting against Governor Walz and with their constituents THIS WEEK. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=3 "Fund Pressure Campaign") [Fund Pressure Campaign](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=4)
---
And I mean it. We've been building resources for this fight and we know **[YOU will keep helping us out](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=5)** until we finally win and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all.
It's going to be incredibly painful for Ecklund, Lislegard, Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede and Sundin if they want to put Governor Walz' powers ahead of the needs of their constituents. Rep Erik Mortensen will be right back at it again this week, making a motion to vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution.
**Democrat leaders will continue to do everything they can to avoid an actual vote by using parliamentary procedures. Including changing the House Rules to require a 60% threshold to bring the vote to the Floor. We'll hold Ecklund, Lislegard, Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede and Sundin personally accountable if this passes.**
We also now know that a watered-down, Fake End Walz' Powers bill is being drafted with help from Republican Rep Barb Haley. Democrat leadership stated this bill will likely get a vote in a couple weeks. This also MUST be opposed
## No deals! No compromise! Nothing else until we End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all!!!
You see why the team at Action 4 Liberty has to work around the clock in this fight? They are pulling every trick in the book.
I want to thank you for your help in this important fight. Several people have asked what else they can do to help. Our team would like to see Letters to the Editor in local papers. If you would like to help us with that, please click the link below and to connect with our volunteer coordinator.
## [YES, I will submit a Letter to the Editor](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=6)
The other thing that would be helpful is to join our lit dropping teams. If you live in or can easily travel to Ely, International Falls, Hibbing, Virginia, Cloquet, Moose Lake, Moorhead or Winona, please click on the link below to help with our door-to-door, business-to-business lit drops.
## [YES, I can help with Lit Drops](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=7)
**If you don't have time to volunteer, please consider helping us print more pieces and buy more air time on radio and digitally with a[donation of $100. If that's too steep, $50 or $25 can go along way to holding them accountable. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=8)**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_campaign_ro&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: It’s time to pray for Congress.
body:
| | Peter, Three things are abundantly clear to me, and they compel me to pray at this moment. First, we are a nation deeply divided. It may be tempting to lay the blame at the feet of those on the opposite side of your political beliefs, but we know that none of us are exempt from the effects of the Fall, and our nation can not be healed without repentance. Second, none of the election results or even the events at the capitol last week took God by surprise. He is still in control, on His throne, and He deserves our worship. And third, each of us is in desperate need of daily guidance from the sovereign, omnipotent, and loving God. That includes each one of us. And it includes our elected leaders at every level from every political persuasion. The new Congress was sworn in on January 3, 2021, and they too will need God’s wisdom and intervention if there is any chance of them governing well and making good decisions to the benefit of the people they represent. Regardless of political party affiliation, election results, election integrity issues, or partisan politics, God commands us clearly in scripture to pray for our leaders. **“I urge, then, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercession, and thanksgiving be made for all people - for kings and all those in authority, that we may live peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness.” (1 Timothy 2:1-2)** That is exactly what we are going to do as one of our very first action items of the year. **[Peter , I urge you to join me and take a couple of minutes to pray, by name, for your elected representatives in the House and Senate. When you do, send an email message letting them know you are praying for them.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=IWTLQXRN6g5-Fs9px6Ckd76mtYkmKr4XhoXTSUr7m6A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210110p2a01&n=1)** Our simple tool will help you pray and send an email right now. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=IWTLQXRN6g5-Fs9px6Ckd76mtYkmKr4XhoXTSUr7m6A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210110p2a01&n=2) While division and violence capture the headlines and the nation's attention, we are a people of prayer holding firm to the Word of God and our eternal hope amid these challenging times. Thank you for praying. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210110p2a01&n=3)

clean_body: | | Peter, Three things are abundantly clear to me, and they compel me to pray at this moment. First, we are a nation deeply divided. It may be tempting to lay the blame at the feet of those on the opposite side of your political beliefs, but we know that none of us are exempt from the effects of the Fall, and our nation can not be healed without repentance. Second, none of the election results or even the events at the capitol last week took God by surprise. He is still in control, on His throne, and He deserves our worship. And third, each of us is in desperate need of daily guidance from the sovereign, omnipotent, and loving God. That includes each one of us. And it includes our elected leaders at every level from every political persuasion. The new Congress was sworn in on January 3, 2021, and they too will need God’s wisdom and intervention if there is any chance of them governing well and making good decisions to the benefit of the people they represent. Regardless of political party affiliation, election results, election integrity issues, or partisan politics, God commands us clearly in scripture to pray for our leaders. “I urge, then, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercession, and thanksgiving be made for all people - for kings and all those in authority, that we may live peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness.” (1 Timothy 2:1-2) That is exactly what we are going to do as one of our very first action items of the year. Our simple tool will help you pray and send an email right now. While division and violence capture the headlines and the nation's attention, we are a people of prayer holding firm to the Word of God and our eternal hope amid these challenging times. Thank you for praying. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes.
